goal: Build a new IsaacLab task from scratch: Allegro hand above a table with cube/cylinder/sphere targets, scene authored as an InteractiveSceneCfg subclass, no GUI.
thoughts: Maya wants real IsaacLab 2.x cfg classes: ArticulationCfg for the hand, RigidObjectCfg for dynamic targets, AssetBaseCfg + GroundPlaneCfg for the static table. Dynamic targets need RigidObjectCfg not AssetBaseCfg — otherwise PhysX will not integrate them. replicate_physics=True is what gives per-env PhysX, not a manual for-loop. gym.make registration is non-optional for eval scripts.
code:
# 1. Confirm Allegro USD path in Nucleus
nucleus_browse(path="omniverse://localhost/NVIDIA/Assets/Isaac/5.0/Isaac/Robots/AllegroHand/")

# 2. Anchor in real IsaacLab 2.x scene cfg patterns
lookup_knowledge(query="IsaacLab 2.x InteractiveSceneCfg ArticulationCfg RigidObjectCfg replicate_physics")

# 3. Confirm primitive spawn configs exist in shipped catalog
catalog_search(query="CuboidCfg SphereCfg CylinderCfg spawn primitives IsaacLab")

# 4. Sketch the scene cfg — Maya wires this herself, but verify path semantics
run_usd_script(script="""
# Reference structure authored in allegro_multi_object_env_cfg.py (NOT at runtime):
# @configclass
# class AllegroMultiObjSceneCfg(InteractiveSceneCfg):
#     num_envs=<N>; env_spacing=<S>; replicate_physics=True
#     ground = AssetBaseCfg(prim_path='/World/ground', spawn=GroundPlaneCfg())
#     robot  = ArticulationCfg(prim_path='{ENV_REGEX_NS}/Robot',
#                              spawn=UsdFileCfg(usd_path='<ALLEGRO_USD>'))
#     cube   = RigidObjectCfg(prim_path='{ENV_REGEX_NS}/Cube',
#                              spawn=CuboidCfg(size=(<SX>,<SY>,<SZ>), rigid_props=..., collision_props=...))
#     sphere = RigidObjectCfg(prim_path='{ENV_REGEX_NS}/Sphere', spawn=SphereCfg(...))
#     cyl    = RigidObjectCfg(prim_path='{ENV_REGEX_NS}/Cyl',    spawn=CylinderCfg(...))
print('cfg skeleton authored to <PKG>/allegro_multi_object_env_cfg.py')
""")
failure_modes: AssetBaseCfg for dynamic targets — no RigidBodyAPI applied, they stay frozen
Skipping gym.register in __init__.py breaks eval scripts that import by task id
replicate_physics=False with 4096 envs serializes per-env PhysX authoring — minutes per startup
Absolute prim paths instead of {ENV_REGEX_NS} — all envs share one instance, RL breaks
